ideal_code.intent: Which California hospitals had at least 250 TAVR cases and an Average mortality rating in 2022?
ideal_code.code:
import io
import re
import pandas as pd
import boto3
from botocore import UNSIGNED
from botocore.config import Config

source = "datagov/california-hospital-ratings-for-transcatheter-aortic-valve-replacement-tavr-procedures/files/2022-tavr-hospital-performance-ratings.txt"
bucket = "lakeqa-yc4103-datalake"


def normalize_text(value):
    value = str(value).replace("\n", " ").replace("\x96", "-").replace("\x97", "-").replace("–", "-").replace("—", "-").strip()
    value = re.sub(r"\s+", " ", value)
    return "" if value.lower() == "nan" else value


def normalize_name(value):
    value = normalize_text(value)
    return value.replace("Cedars - Sinai Medical Center", "Cedars-Sinai Medical Center")

obj = boto3.client("s3", config=Config(signature_version=UNSIGNED)).get_object(Bucket=bucket, Key=source)
df = pd.read_csv(io.BytesIO(obj["Body"].read()), low_memory=False)
df.columns = [normalize_text(column) for column in df.columns]
for column in df.columns:
    if df[column].dtype == object:
        df[column] = df[column].map(normalize_text)

df["Hospital"] = df["Hospital"].map(normalize_name)
df["Total Hospital TAVR Cases"] = pd.to_numeric(df["Total Hospital TAVR Cases"], errors="coerce")

mortality = df[df["Performance Measure"].eq("TAVR In-hospital/30-day Mortality")].copy()
answer = sorted(
    mortality.loc[
        mortality["Total Hospital TAVR Cases"].ge(250)
        & mortality["Performance Rating"].eq("Average"),
        "Hospital"
    ].tolist()
)

ideal_code.intent: Which hospitals had at least 35,000 ambulatory surgery encounters in 2019?
ideal_code.code:
import io
import re
import pandas as pd
import boto3
from botocore import UNSIGNED
from botocore.config import Config

source = "datagov/effects-of-covid-19-on-hospital-utilization-trends-636d2/files/hospital-utilization-trends.txt"
bucket = "lakeqa-yc4103-datalake"


def normalize_text(value):
    value = str(value).replace("\n", " ").replace("\x96", "-").replace("\x97", "-").replace("–", "-").replace("—", "-").strip()
    value = re.sub(r"\s+", " ", value)
    return "" if value.lower() == "nan" else value

obj = boto3.client("s3", config=Config(signature_version=UNSIGNED)).get_object(Bucket=bucket, Key=source)
df = pd.read_csv(io.BytesIO(obj["Body"].read()), low_memory=False)
df.columns = [normalize_text(column) for column in df.columns]
for column in df.columns:
    if df[column].dtype == object:
        df[column] = df[column].map(normalize_text)

df["Count"] = pd.to_numeric(df["Count"], errors="coerce")
df["year"] = df["Date"].str[-2:].map(lambda value: 2000 + int(value) if str(value).isdigit() else None)

ranked = (
    df.groupby(["Facility Name", "Setting", "year"], dropna=False)["Count"]
    .sum()
    .reset_index()
)

answer = sorted(
    ranked.loc[
        ranked["Setting"].eq("Ambulatory Surgery")
        & ranked["year"].eq(2019)
        & ranked["Count"].ge(35000),
        "Facility Name"
    ].tolist()
)
answer: UC San Diego Health Hillcrest - Hillcrest Medical Center

ideal_code.intent: For the hospital from <hop 1 answer>, which county had the highest total of homeless inpatient encounters broken down by age?
ideal_code.code:
import io
import re
import pandas as pd
import boto3
from botocore import UNSIGNED
from botocore.config import Config

source = "datagov/hospital-encounters-for-homeless-patients-79a6f/files/2019-2020-homeless-hospital-encounters-age-race-sex-expected-payer-by-facility.txt"
bucket = "lakeqa-yc4103-datalake"


def normalize_text(value):
    value = str(value).replace("\n", " ").replace("\x96", "-").replace("\x97", "-").replace("–", "-").replace("—", "-").strip()
    value = re.sub(r"\s+", " ", value)
    return "" if value.lower() == "nan" else value

obj = boto3.client("s3", config=Config(signature_version=UNSIGNED)).get_object(Bucket=bucket, Key=source)
df = pd.read_csv(io.BytesIO(obj["Body"].read()), low_memory=False)
df.columns = [normalize_text(column) for column in df.columns]
for column in df.columns:
    if df[column].dtype == object:
        df[column] = df[column].map(normalize_text)

df["Encounters"] = pd.to_numeric(df["Encounters"], errors="coerce")

county_totals = (
    df[
        df["FacilityName"].eq("Stanford Health Care")
        & df["EncounterType"].eq("Inpatient Hospitalizations")
        & df["HomelessIndicator"].eq("Homeless")
        & df["Demographic"].eq("Age")
    ]
    .groupby("HospitalCounty")["Encounters"]
    .sum()
    .sort_values(ascending=False)
)

answer = county_totals.index[0] + " County"

ideal_code.intent: For the city from <hop 3 answer>, which three health-outcome measures had the highest crude prevalence values in 2021?
ideal_code.code:
import io
import csv
import boto3
from botocore import UNSIGNED
from botocore.config import Config

source = "datagov/places-local-data-for-better-health-place-data-2021-release-06a9b/files/rows.txt"
bucket = "lakeqa-yc4103-datalake"

client = boto3.client("s3", config=Config(signature_version=UNSIGNED))
obj = client.get_object(Bucket=bucket, Key=source)
reader = csv.DictReader(io.TextIOWrapper(obj["Body"], encoding="utf-8"))
rows = []
for row in reader:
    if row["StateAbbr"].strip() != "CA" or row["LocationName"].strip() != "San Jose":
        continue
    if row["Data_Value_Type"].strip() != "Crude prevalence" or row["Category"].strip() != "Health Outcomes":
        continue
    value = row["Data_Value"].strip()
    if value:
        rows.append((row["Short_Question_Text"].strip(), float(value)))

rows.sort(key=lambda item: (-item[1], item[0]))
answer = [measure for measure, _ in rows[:3]]

ideal_code.intent: For the city from <hop 3 answer>, which health-outcome measures had crude prevalence values of at least 15 but below 23 in 2022?
ideal_code.code:
import io
import csv
import boto3
from botocore import UNSIGNED
from botocore.config import Config

source = "datagov/places-local-data-for-better-health-place-data-2022-release/files/rows.txt"
bucket = "lakeqa-yc4103-datalake"

client = boto3.client("s3", config=Config(signature_version=UNSIGNED))
obj = client.get_object(Bucket=bucket, Key=source)
reader = csv.DictReader(io.TextIOWrapper(obj["Body"], encoding="utf-8"))
answer = []
for row in reader:
    if row["StateAbbr"].strip() != "CA" or row["LocationName"].strip() != "San Jose":
        continue
    if row["Data_Value_Type"].strip() != "Crude prevalence" or row["Category"].strip() != "Health Outcomes":
        continue
    value = row["Data_Value"].strip()
    if not value:
        continue
    value = float(value)
    if 15 <= value < 23:
        answer.append((row["Short_Question_Text"].strip(), value))

answer = [measure for measure, _ in sorted(answer, key=lambda item: (-item[1], item[0]))]

ideal_query.intent: For the hospital from <hop 1 answer>, which county had the highest total of homeless inpatient encounters broken down by age?
ideal_query.sql:
SELECT CONCAT("HospitalCounty", ' County') AS answer
FROM t
WHERE "FacilityName" = 'Stanford Health Care'
  AND "EncounterType" = 'Inpatient Hospitalizations'
  AND "HomelessIndicator" = 'Homeless'
  AND "Demographic" = 'Age'
GROUP BY "HospitalCounty"
ORDER BY SUM(TRY_CAST("Encounters" AS DOUBLE)) DESC, "HospitalCounty" ASC
LIMIT 1

ideal_query.intent: For the city from <hop 3 answer>, which three health-outcome measures had the highest crude prevalence values in 2021?
ideal_query.sql:
SELECT json_group_array("Short_Question_Text") AS answer
FROM (
  SELECT "Short_Question_Text", TRY_CAST("Data_Value" AS DOUBLE) AS value
  FROM t
  WHERE "StateAbbr" = 'CA'
    AND "LocationName" = 'San Jose'
    AND "Data_Value_Type" = 'Crude prevalence'
    AND "Category" = 'Health Outcomes'
    AND TRIM(COALESCE(CAST("Data_Value" AS VARCHAR), '')) != ''
  ORDER BY value DESC, "Short_Question_Text" ASC
  LIMIT 3
)

ideal_query.intent: For the city from <hop 3 answer>, which health-outcome measures had crude prevalence values of at least 15 but below 23 in 2022?
ideal_query.sql:
SELECT json_group_array("Short_Question_Text") AS answer
FROM (
  SELECT "Short_Question_Text", TRY_CAST("Data_Value" AS DOUBLE) AS value
  FROM t
  WHERE "StateAbbr" = 'CA'
    AND "LocationName" = 'San Jose'
    AND "Data_Value_Type" = 'Crude prevalence'
    AND "Category" = 'Health Outcomes'
    AND TRY_CAST("Data_Value" AS DOUBLE) >= 15
    AND TRY_CAST("Data_Value" AS DOUBLE) < 23
  ORDER BY value DESC, "Short_Question_Text" ASC
)
